pageDescription: Estimate roof area, pitch, materials, and cost instantly. Enter length, width, and pitch to get roof squares, waste allowance, and a full replacement cost estimate.
pitchHint: Enter rise in X:12 format (e.g. 6 for 6:12). A 6:12 pitch rises 6 inches per 12 inches of run.
pitchTooltipBody: Pitch is rise over run. A 6:12 pitch means the roof rises 6 inches for every 12 inches horizontally. Steeper pitch increases surface area and material needs. Pitch multiplier = √(1 + (rise ÷ 12)²).
importantBody: Enter the horizontal length and width of the building footprint at the eaves, not the sloped surface length. The calculator applies pitch and roof type factors automatically.
resultsSubtitle: Area, squares, waste, and cost breakdown
emptyHint: Select roof type, enter dimensions, pitch, and costs — results update as you type.
proTip1: Add 10–15% waste for simple gable roofs; use 15–20% for hips, valleys, and complex cuts.
proTip2: One roofing square = 100 sq ft of roof area (≈ 9.29 m²).
proTip3: Measure length and width at the eaves along the building footprint.
proTip4: Material quotes are per square — confirm whether delivery and underlayment are included.
proTip5: Hip roofs typically need 10–15% more material than gable roofs of the same footprint.
errPitch: Enter a valid pitch (0–24 for X:12).
errMaterialCost: Enter a valid material cost per square.
